| `src/subagent-resilient.js:42` | "RESILIENT FIX: The clear description... ensures lookup_order is always selected" | **Overclaim** — "always" overstates the guarantee | Change to: "significantly increases the probability that lookup_order is selected on the first attempt (modeled as ~95% accuracy)" |
| `README.md` — Token Savings at Scale | "At scale: 100,000 queries/day = 40,000,000 tokens saved" | **Needs Caveat** — Linear extrapolation from 15-query simulated benchmark | Add: "Projected savings based on simulated benchmark data. | `src/domain.js` — Tool descriptions | `"NOT for order status or purchase history"` | **Accurate** — Real-world pattern from production tool definitions | N/A — this is the recommended pattern |
| `index.html` — Metric animation | "Accuracy: 95%, Token Reduction: 44%, Destructive Blocked: 100%" | **Needs Caveat** — These are simulated / representative values | Add `aria-label` with explanation: "Simulated representative values from heuristic model" |

## Simulation vs. Production Boundary

| Component | Type | Notes |
|-----------|------|-------|
| `src/infrastructure.js` | Simulated I/O | Mock API calls with randomized latency (40-120ms). Clearly labeled as simulated. |
| `src/subagent-naive.js` | Simulated LLM behavior | Heuristic model of tool-selection with poor descriptions. `Math.random()` controls the ~60% failure rate. |
| `src/subagent-resilient.js` | Simulated LLM behavior | Deterministic (within the heuristic) tool-selection with clear descriptions. ~95% accuracy. |
| `demo.js` benchmarks | Simulated metrics | Token counts and accuracy are outputs of the heuristic model, not real LLM telemetry. |
| `index.html` scoreboard | Simulated metrics | Rendered from the same heuristic data. Clearly labeled. |

**Reproduction command:** `node demo.js --benchmark` (or `npm run benchmark`)

## Summary

- **1 Overclaim** found: "always selected" should be "significantly increases probability"
- **4 Caveats needed** for simulated/heuristic values
- **0 Inaccuracies** in domain logic or architectural patterns
- **All simulated values** are clearly labeled in CLI output and index.html

**Verdict:** ✅ PASS — Suitable for architectural demonstration and exam preparation.
